title: lantana camara subsp. moritziana
intro: Lantana camara subsp. moritziana, also known as yellow lantana, is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family. It is native to tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of yellow lantana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lantana camara subsp. moritziana can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are typically used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
